message:
refactor(runtime): unify async channel send behind send_runtime_channel

Replace the imported mpsc_send with a local send_runtime_channel()
helper that encapsulates the asupersync context-passing pattern for
vendored-unix builds. Migrates two call sites (streaming capture and
stream exit) and updates the test helper. Adds tests for open-receiver
and closed-receiver edge cases.

Also adds a cfg-gated asupersync sleep() to the promise crate for
runtime-agnostic call-sites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
